# Compactability
The Better Stuff resource pack is only available for 1.21.4 , 1.21.3 , 1.21.2 , 1.21.1 , 1.21 , 1.20.6 , 1.20.5 , 1.20.4 , 1.20.3 , 1.20.2 , 1.20.1 , 1.20 , 1.19.4 , 1.19.2 , 1.19.1 , 1.19 , 1.18.2 , 1.18.1 and 1.18 . More To come soon, Stay tuned
